title: SteamPunk
description: Detailed & Immersive SteamPunk Theme Modpack w/ 1000+ Quests!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33da70f2ef4b15fd16a7b4bcc503002312d532fe.png)

![In all-caps bold text, the word "FEATURES". ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/785d3640a720d7e56cba3a6e2bbcdc37f34cf7e1.png)

⚙️ Full parity with [Curseforge Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/steam-punk)

⚙️ Create Rise and Shine Update w/ Addons

⚙️ Amazing NEW World Generation and Biomes

⚙️ Incredible detailed Structures and Dungeons to Explore

⚙️ Completely NEW Stronghold and Fortress

⚙️ Overhauled Villages, Structures & Dungeons

⚙️ Never seen before NEW Bosses & Steam Mobs

⚙️ 5 NEW Dimensions & 5 NEW Planets to Explore!

⚙️ Skills, Magic, Tetra & most importantly Steam like Tech

⚙️ NEW Game Mechanics such as Thin Air & Cold Sweat

⚙️ NEW Game Features such as Tempad, Improvable Skills, & Guns

⚙️ 1000+ Detailed Quests to help Guide you & 1000+ Advancements!

[![Live count of how many members are online in the Luna Pixel Studios discord server.](https://img.shields.io/discord/790272037578473512?label=Discord&color=393939&labelColor=0843bf&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://lunapixel.studio/discord)
[![Use code LUNAPIXEL for 25% off Bisect Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c3d1af34a17cb45f2ba4b9cfca4bd54d1c857ef.png)](https://lunapixel.studio/bisect)
